name: Aspirin (Acetylsalicylic Acid)
description: Oogun egboogi-iredodo ti kii-sitẹriọdu (NSAID) pẹlu awọn ohun-ini antiplatelet. Itọju laini akọkọ fun a fura si iṣọn-ẹjẹ iṣọn-alọ ọkan nla (ACS). Ni aibikita ṣe idilọwọ iṣakojọpọ platelet - ipa yoo duro fun igbesi aye platelet (ọjọ 7-10).
indications: Ti a fura si infarction myocardial nla (MI) - jẹun lẹsẹkẹsẹ
Angina aiduroṣinṣin / iṣọn-ẹjẹ iṣọn-alọ ọkan nla
Ọgbẹ (ischemic - lẹhin ti a yọ ẹjẹ kuro)
dose: ACS: 325 mg PO - CHEW (maṣe gbe odidi mì) lẹsẹkẹsẹ. Analgesic / antipyretic: 325-650 mg PO q4-6h PRN.
window: ACS: Fun ni kutukutu bi o ti ṣee - jẹun lẹsẹkẹsẹ lori ifura.
contraindications: Aleji aspirin ti a mọ tabi aibalẹ NSAID
Ẹjẹ ti ko ni idari ti o lagbara - aspirin nmu ẹjẹ ẹjẹ buru si
warnings: Ma ṣe fun ni awọn alaisan ti o ni ẹjẹ -- aspirin ni aibikita ṣe aibikita iṣẹ platelet ati ki o buru si ẹjẹ.
MAA ṢE fun awọn ọmọde ọdun 12 pẹlu aisan ọlọjẹ - ewu ti iṣọn-ẹjẹ Reye.
Irritation GI - mu pẹlu ounjẹ ti kii ṣe pajawiri.

pediatric.dose: Analgesic / antipyretic: 10-15 mg/kg PO q4-6h (max 650 mg / dose). AKIYESI: Contraindicated ni gbogun ti aisan (Reye dídùn).
pediatric.note: Lo acetaminophen (paracetamol) fun iba ni awọn ọmọde ti o ni arun ọlọjẹ dipo.

obstetric.note: Yẹra fun oyun paapaa ni oṣu mẹta mẹta (titiipa ti ductus arteriosus ti tọjọ). Iwọn kekere (81mg) ni a lo fun idena iṣaaju-eclampsia labẹ itọnisọna dokita nikan.
